items.front: What three entities must receive explosive cargo information under 10-5-1?
items.back: 1. The emergency equipment crew. 2. The airport management. 3. The appropriate military agencies (when requested by the pilot).

items.front: How often should the debris mishap alert broadcast be reissued under 10-5-2?
items.back: Approximately every 15 minutes, when workload permits.

items.front: What are the three actions for aircraft already within an activated Debris Response Area under 10-5-2?
items.back: 1. Assist aircraft to exit the DRA expeditiously. 2. Do NOT withhold landing or approach clearances. For airports underlying the DRA: do NOT issue departure releases or takeoff clearances, and do not clear aircraft onto the movement area.

items.front: What actions are prohibited at airports underlying an active DRA under 10-5-2?
items.back: Do NOT issue departure releases or takeoff clearances. To the extent possible, do NOT clear aircraft onto the movement area. Landing/approach clearances are NOT withheld.
